description: Multi-attribute question bank for simultaneous tracking of nationality, sex, age group, and height deviation

questions.text: What's your go-to comfort food when you're feeling down?
Which sport do you enjoy watching the most?
What best describes your current life stage?
Which social media platform do you use most?

options.text: 🚫 I don't use social media much

questions.text: What's your preferred way to spend a Friday evening?
When buying pants/jeans, what's your typical inseam length?
What's your shoe size? (US sizing)
What size gloves do you typically wear?
How do you feel about airplane legroom in economy class?

options.text: 😣 Very cramped, knees hit the seat

questions.text: How often do you need to duck or watch your head around doorways?

options.text: 🚪 Never, doorways are always plenty high
😐 Sometimes, I'm aware of low doorways

questions.text: When taking group photos, where do you usually end up?

options.text: 🎯 Always asked to go to the back

questions.text: How do standard kitchen counters feel to you?

options.text: 🔝 Too high, need step stool sometimes
😣 Way too low, back hurts after cooking

questions.text: How do you reach items on high shelves at home?
At concerts or events, can you see over the crowd?
How do shower heads work for you in most places?

options.text: 😐 Need to duck or bend a bit

questions.text: How do you adjust your car seat?

options.text: 🚗 Move it forward to reach pedals
🔙 All the way back for legroom
😤 Even all the way back isn't enough
